meaning: adj.石英的,主要[全部]为石英构成的
examples: The Possibility of replacement of feldspa and quartz by feldspa-quartzose stone was studied in glazed tile production.
There exist two types of organic inclusions in the quartzose grain cracks of oil sandstone reservoir in Lukeqin structural belt, Turpan-Hami basin.
The reservoirs of the Yanchang formation almost are fine feldspathic sandstone, feldspathic debris sandstone, rock fragment feldspathic sandstone, and little quartzose sandstone.
